# deploySolution

> Validates config, sets status to active, creates a new version

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| solutionId | string | yes |
| changelog | string | yes |
| publishedBy | string | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[solution: call findSolutionById]
  A --> B[validate: condition]
  B --> C[nextVersion: assign]
  C --> D[version: call createSolutionVersion]
  D --> E[updated: call updateSolution]
  E --> F[emitDeployed: call emitSolutionDeployed]
  F --> G[result: return]
```
